error_flow_unrecovered: Observed error flow could not recover or expose a repair boundary
internal_helper_only: Rehearsal used an internal helper instead of the public CLI black box
missing_ack_result_accepted: Missing-ACK result was accepted as authoritative
planning_chain_terminal: Planning packet chain reached terminal completion before route nodes
result_body_leak: Public status leaked a sealed role result body
route_mutation_without_frontier_rewrite: Route mutation did not rewrite the execution frontier
side_command_surface_available: Retired side-command completion surface was still available
startup_body_leak: Public status leaked the sealed startup body
terminal_active_lease: Terminal status retained an active lease
terminal_missing_role_packet: Terminal status did not include all required role packets
terminal_missing_route_node: Final route-wide ledger built before three route nodes completed
Terminal completion missed an effective route node
wrong_role_lease_accepted: Wrong-role lease was accepted against another role's packet

dead_lease_advances_node: dead or inactive lease advanced a node
missing_node_terminal_complete: final route-wide ledger built before all node dispositions
terminal closure passed with an incomplete effective node
mutation_without_frontier_rewrite: route mutation did not rewrite execution frontier
pm_plan_terminal_complete: PM planning packet chain reached terminal completion
stale_node_evidence_accepted: stale node evidence was accepted after route/source change
wrong_flowguard_target_accepted: wrong FlowGuard modeled target satisfied a node

payload.error: lease responsibility does not match packet

commands.stdout_excerpt:
usage: flowpilot_new.py [-h] [--root ROOT] [--json]
                        {start,run-fake-e2e,status,lease-agent,ack,submit-result}
                        ...

Formal entrypoint for the new black-box FlowPilot runtime. This entrypoint
starts a new FlowPilot run from the native startup intake UI,
